title: TARDITH
description: a very basic TARDIM and Zenith based pack
body:
A mostly subtle modpack, with a good amount of data driven content and quality of life mods.
Lots of secrets to discover along with a few more advancements, this modpack includes the legendary premium dirt and epic head space.  can be played single player but some content is only available for the multiplayer format (the horn resounding etc).
The main aim of this pack is to be light-weight and subtley complex for people that are used to all vanilla MC has to offer and want to take a journey one step into the future.\
This pack is designed to be played without a modded recipe look-up tool such as REI.

included mods include:
- antique atlas
- gravestones
- iris
- kubejs
- origins
- tardim
- trash slot
- zenith

Features:
There can be only one
- you may use the dragon egg to craft the tardis

Additional additions:
- pickles
- collection items for genX discophiles
- suspicious technology
- shady helmets
